body.question: What would make this easier (suck less).
body.taxonomy_is_cc0_proposal: Akien supplied the QUESTIONS. `function`/`class`/`level` are CC.0's proposal — overrulable.
body.notes: CP4 ('make everything suck less for everybody') as a THINKING MOVE, not just a value. He uses the phrase 'suck less' verbatim in the question itself, six days before the code seeding.
body.PENDING_RECONCILIATION: TWO HOMES EXIST for this corpus — see T-questions-corpus-two-homes. skills/questions/questions.json declares itself 'the SINGLE canonical source'; CLAUDE.md says dev-process artifacts live ONLY under devlab/runtime/memory/. Do NOT treat either as settled until Akien rules.
